footnotes.text: Angel: the guardian angel of the church, or the bishop of the church. If St. John addresses the bishops, he regards them as the incarnation of their respective churches.
Ten days: the period of trial would be limited.
Second death: a death which is other than the death of the body, i.e., the final condemnation of sinners.
Depths of Satan: these teachers call their science the deep secrets of God, but Christ calls it the deep secrets of Satan.
